entries.definition:
n–m–m louse ;slight, gentle sound; to show through, (of scent)
to waft about; to disclose or betray a confidence, to spread
malicious rumours, to slander, to sow dissension, slanderer,
calumny. Of this root, نَمِيم namīm, occurs once in the Qur’an.

967
